pkgmetadata.longdescription: Leiden is a general algorithm for methods of community detection in large networks.Please refer to the documentation httpleidenalg.readthedocs.ioenlatest_for more details.The source code of this package is hosted at GitHub httpsgithub.comvtraagleidenalg_.Issues and bug reports are welcome at httpsgithub.comvtraagleidenalgissues.
